note: Figma MCP (use_figma / get_metadata / get_screenshot via the Figma plugin server) was confirmed working in this session and used to inspect and mutate the file directly, across four build passes (the fourth via /loop dynamic self-pacing) in one continuous session. The file already contained a substantial pre-existing design system (20 pages, 4 variable collections with Light+High Contrast modes, 6 text styles, 2 effect styles, and 6 Component Sets) that prior GAP_REPORT entries had incorrectly described as never built. Pass 1: added 8 Component Sets, reconciled brand color, built the first real pattern board. Pass 2: added a PG ERD Icon set, a real Login Flow, real prototype reactions on the Core Flow. Pass 3: traversed real KRDS pages via WebFetch, added 8 more Component Sets (incl. the two required by the completion criteria: generic Modal, Header), 2 more pattern boards, rebuilt Accessibility Lab around real objects, added a KRDS Source Inventory table, found a real shared-TEXT-property-default Plugin API bug. Pass 4: closed the two remaining self-audit gaps — 3 real Grid Styles (Desktop/Tablet/Mobile) with visible column overlays (grids don't render in exports), and the file's first Boolean + Instance Swap component properties, wired and demonstrated on PG ERD Button. All additions verified with get_screenshot after creation. See docs/GAP_REPORT.md for what remains open.
